column1: # Matter single-app (no-OTA) partition table for ESP32-C6 / 4 MB flash.
# STAGED for the Matter migration — NOT used by the current MQTT build. It becomes
# active only when sdkconfig.defaults.matter is applied (which points
# CONFIG_PARTITION_TABLE_CUSTOM_FILENAME here). Partition table offset is 0x8000.

column2: so this is a SINGLE factory app (no OTA slots).

column1: #   - `factory` = 3 MB: ample for a Matter app (~1.5 MB) + headroom.
#   - `fctry`   = 24 KB nvs: holds the Device Attestation Certificate (DAC) /
#                 factory data written by esp-matter's mfg_tool (test creds for DIY).
